function.name: subagent_spawn
function.description: Spawn a new sub-agent that inherits your model, tools, skills, and system prompt. The sub-agent runs in parallel and communicates results back to you via the agent messaging protocol. Use this to parallelize independent work — each sub-agent processes one task concurrently. Sub-agents are auto-destroyed after 10 minutes of idle. Returns the sub-agent's ID.

task.description: A clear, self-contained task description for the sub-agent. Include all necessary context — the sub-agent starts with your same tools and skills but has no knowledge of your current conversation.

function.name: subagent_destroy
function.description: Destroy a sub-agent by its ID. Use this to clean up a sub-agent when you no longer need it, or to stop one that isn't behaving as expected.

sub_agent_id.description: The ID of the sub-agent to destroy.

function.name: subagent_list
function.description: List all your live sub-agents. Returns their IDs, creation times, and last activity times.
